2026-05-04T14:48:13.0000000NO CHANGES MADE TO THE SUEDE WALL COVERING'S SIGNAGE BEHIND THE RECEPTION.jpgFW: Midrand Eastern SignageOpen preview
2026-05-04T14:48:13.0000000NO SIGNAGE ON THE RECEPTION ENTRANCE'S PYLON.jpgFW: Midrand Eastern SignageOpen preview
2026-05-04T14:48:13.0000000SIGNAGE DONE ON OUR RECEPTION CENTRE SLIDING DOOR LEADING TO OUR TRAINING ROOM & BOARDROOMS.jpgFW: Midrand Eastern SignageOpen preview

2026-05-04T14:48:13.0000000BUILDING 3 - FLOOR 1, SIGNAGE TOO LOW AND WILL SOON BE DAMAGED BY THE CHAIR'S BACK AND FORTH MOVEMENT.jpgFW: Midrand Eastern SignageOpen preview
